description: Transient Runtime Prompts and Safe Artifact Cleanup - evolving PRD slice

finalSuccessCriteria.description: Ralph no longer leaves setup/runtime artifacts in target repositories: init avoids installing Ralph prompt/example artifacts, run and fix load prompts from the installed Ralph dependency, runtime prompt files are cleaned up or restored, and fix can safely remove stale Ralph-generated root artifacts only when their contents exactly match known current or previous Ralph-generated versions.
acceptanceCriteria: ralph init no longer copies DEVELOPER.md, PLANNER.md, DOCTOR.md, or prd.json.example into the target project by default
ralph run loads DEVELOPER.md and PLANNER.md from the Ralph package templates instead of requiring those files in the target project
ralph fix loads DOCTOR.md from the Ralph package templates instead of requiring that file in the target project
The active validation issue(s) are still injected into the doctor prompt before the single fix pass runs
Generated runtime prompt files such as prompt.md, CLAUDE.md, and AGENTS.md are removed after run/fix when Ralph created them
If a runtime prompt file already existed before run/fix, Ralph restores its previous contents instead of deleting or overwriting it permanently
ralph fix detects stale root Ralph artifacts including DEVELOPER.md, PLANNER.md, DOCTOR.md, prd.json.example, prompt.md, CLAUDE.md, and AGENTS.md
ralph fix removes a stale root artifact only when its full normalized content exactly matches a known current or previous Ralph-generated version for that artifact
ralph fix preserves and reports any candidate artifact whose content does not exactly match a known Ralph-generated version
Errors during an AI phase still trigger cleanup or restoration before the command exits
Documentation and CLI help describe the overall fix behavior and no longer tell users to keep phase prompt/example files in their project root
Typecheck passes
Manual CLI verification demonstrates init omits root artifacts, run/fix clean up or restore runtime prompt files, and fix removes only exact-match stale artifacts while preserving modified files
finalSuccessCriteria.notes: Cycle 1 completed the dependency-sourced transient runtime prompt behavior. Cycle 2 expands the overall fix scope to safe stale-artifact cleanup.

planning.currentObjective: Expand ralph fix into an overall safe cleanup flow for stale Ralph-generated root artifacts

prdChain.notes: US-001 passed: init stopped copying phase prompt files; run/fix load prompts from package templates; runtime prompt cleanup/restoration added.

prdChain.objective: Safely remove stale Ralph-generated root artifacts

userStories.title: Safely clean stale Ralph root artifacts
userStories.description: As a Ralph user, I want the fix command to remove old Ralph-generated root artifacts only when they exactly match known generated versions, so my repository can be cleaned up without risking other people's customized work.
acceptanceCriteria: Update ralph init so it no longer copies prd.json.example into the target project by default, in addition to not copying DEVELOPER.md, PLANNER.md, or DOCTOR.md
Add stale-artifact detection to ralph fix for root DEVELOPER.md, PLANNER.md, DOCTOR.md, prd.json.example, prompt.md, CLAUDE.md, and AGENTS.md
For DEVELOPER.md, PLANNER.md, and DOCTOR.md, remove the root file only when its full normalized content exactly matches a known current or previous Ralph-generated version of the same file
For prd.json.example and runtime prompt files, remove the root file only when its full normalized content exactly matches a known Ralph-generated/template/runtime version for that artifact
If a candidate artifact exists but does not exactly match a known generated version, leave it untouched and print a warning or summary that it was preserved
Run stale-artifact cleanup even when prd.json is already valid, so ralph fix is an overall cleanup/fix command rather than only a PRD-schema doctor
When both stale artifacts and prd.json validation errors exist, clean safe exact-match artifacts and still run the existing one-pass doctor flow with injected validation errors
Update README/CLI documentation to explain safe exact-match cleanup and the preserved-file behavior
Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck` exits 0 in cli/)
Manual CLI verification in a temporary directory confirms exact-match artifacts are removed, modified artifacts are preserved, and valid prd.json plus stale artifacts does not invoke a doctor pass
userStories.notes: Implemented exact-match stale artifact cleanup in ralph fix, removed prd.json.example from init, and updated CLI/docs to describe cleanup and preserved-file behavior.
